summary: Completed testing of Practice Mode feature and Minting Bug Fix (Iteration 37). Both features are working correctly. Practice Mode allows users to battle bots without risking BL coins or stamina. The minting bug fix (passing raw base64 to ImageContent) was verified in previous iteration.

issues: Console warning: 'Encountered two children with the same key' - minor React key issue in animation components

passed_tests: Backend: /api/photo-game/start with practice_mode=true creates game session correctly
Backend: Practice mode sets practice_mode=true flag in session
Backend: Practice mode forces bot opponent even if different opponent_id specified
Backend: Practice mode forces bet_amount=0 even if bet specified
Backend: Practice mode does NOT deduct player stamina
Backend: Practice mode does NOT deduct photo stamina
Backend: Practice mode game completes correctly through all phases (RPS -> Photo Battle -> Tiebreaker)
Backend: Practice mode does NOT update player stats (battles_won, total_bl_won)
Backend: Practice mode sets winnings_distributed=true and practice_mode_result=true on completion
Backend: Regular battles (practice_mode=false) DO deduct photo stamina (~4.16% per battle)
Backend: /api/photo-game/config returns correct RPS auction config
Backend: /api/photo-game/battle-photos returns photos with stamina info
Frontend: Photo Game Arena loads with 'Dollar Auction Arena' header
Frontend: Photo selection shows 3 photos with dollar values, scenery types, stamina bars
Frontend: Practice Mode button visible with data-testid='practice-mode-btn'
Frontend: Practice Mode button text: 'Practice vs Bot (No Risk)🎯'
Frontend: Helper text shows 'Practice mode: No BL bet, no stamina loss, no rewards - just practice!'
Frontend: Clicking Practice Mode shows toast 'Practice mode started! No risk, just fun.'
Frontend: RPS Auction phase starts with $10M bankroll for both players
Frontend: RPS choice buttons (Rock, Paper, Scissors) work correctly
Frontend: Bid buttons ($1.0M - $5.0M) work correctly
Frontend: Game score updates correctly after RPS rounds
critical_code_review_comments: Practice mode implementation in photo_game.py lines 348-460 correctly skips stamina deduction when practice_mode=True
_process_game_result in photo_game.py lines 786-810 correctly skips all rewards/stats updates for practice mode
StartGameRequest in game_routes.py line 54 correctly includes practice_mode: bool = False field
Frontend PhotoGameArena.jsx correctly implements Practice Mode button with data-testid and calls /api/photo-game/start with practice_mode=true
seed_data_creation: Used existing admin photos for testing: mint_f2f77a69dbaa4e9e, mint_4e19579dd6e44c53, mint_7306e0a6afe34eb7
context_for_next_testing_agent: Practice Mode feature fully implemented and tested. Key points: 1) practice_mode=true in /api/photo-game/start skips stamina deduction and BL coin betting, 2) _process_game_result skips all rewards/stats for practice games, 3) Frontend has Practice Mode button with data-testid='practice-mode-btn'. Admin user has 3 minted photos available. Photo minting bug fix from iteration 36 still working.
